privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
body: Acme collects contact details only when you submit a form, send an email, or interact with consent-gated tools.
We use this information to respond to messages and to honor your cookie preferences.
This policy will be updated as vendors, retention practices, and jurisdictional requirements change.

terms.heading: Terms of Use
body: This site provides information, articles, and contact options.
Use the site lawfully. Do not copy, resell, or misrepresent its content without permission.
Details may change as the project evolves.

cookies.heading: Cookie Policy
body: Necessary cookies store your preferences and support basic site operation.
Optional marketing cookies stay disabled unless you grant consent. Cloudflare Zaraz integrations remain consent-gated.
